detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use prc driver.

sect1.title: xprc_selftest_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XPrc driver directly. This example performs the basic selftest on the device using the driver.

sect1.title: xprc_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XPrc driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver to test the registers.
